name: Jambalaya Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 Ounces Cooked Shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the salad dressing, celery, green pepper, onion, thyme, red pepper flakes, salt, and minced garlic.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Add the cooked rice, cubed ham, shrimp, and chopped tomato to the bowl.
4. Mix gently to combine all ingredients.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
6. Just before serving, crumble the bacon slices over the salad.
